CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2014 Continued To Feb-18-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Hearing On Motion To Strike Of Doran Construction And Design, Inc. To Pliantiffs' First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. PAMELA B. SHAFER of Rankin, Sproat, Mires, Beaty & Reynolds, Tel No. (510) 465-3922 appearing for the Defendant Doran Construction and Design, Inc.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DORAN CONSTRUCTION AND DESIGN, INC.'S Motion To Strike Plaintiffs' First Amended Complaint is granted in its entirety without leave to amend. Plaintiff cannot recover general/emotional distress damages as a matter of law. See Erlich v. Menezes (1999) 21 Cal.4th 543, 554; Lubner v. City of Los Angeles (1996) 45 Cal.App.4th 525. The court strikes the allegations regarding defendant's alleged lie. That is an evidentiary fact that is unnecessary and irrelevant to pleading the negligence claim. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Continued To Jan-07-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Hearing On Motion To Strike Of Doran Construction And Design, Inc. To Pliantiffs' First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-17-2014 Continued To Dec-22-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT DORAN CONSTRUCTION AND DESIGN, INC.'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs' First Amended Complaint is continued to December 22, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302, to give the opposing party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of its filings with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
